Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Happiness, sadness, anger... Emotions are meant to be felt and expressed, and movies are an excellent way to keep your brain and soul stimulated. {f 1 3 133}[n]Our soft seats are waiting for you. {f 1 3 132}[n]Fun Fact: Different movies will have different effects on you! (But maybe that's common sense.)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rewarding job that provides a range of emotions. Students may apply. Visit the theater for more details.[n]{f 1 5 0}Fun Fact: Movie theaters stimulate the mind in various ways. For example, flex your brain muscles by learning more about movies, or conquer your fears by watching a scary movie in the dark![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The theater is packed today! It's as hectic as a drama![n]{f 1 5 0}We're urgently looking for someone who can work as fast as an action movie protagonist![n]{f 1 5 0}The paycheck will be as big as a Hollywood star's! Well, that's not true... But it'll be more than usual![n]{f 1 5 0}We hope to welcome you to the team![n]{f 1 1}
